title: Washer Motor Rotor Position Sensor Replacement Part, DC31-00098A Motor Hall Sensor Replaces, Compatible with Samsung Washing Machines AP4578642 PS4204673 2068316
features: [Material]: The washer motor rotor position sensor is made of high quality plastic, compact structure, stable performance, it is resistant to compression and wear, and has a long service life

[Good Performance]: The washer motor rotor position sensor accurately monitors the direction and speed of rotation of the rotor and transmits this critical information to the electronic control board. This function ensures precise control and efficient operation of the washing machine during the washing process
[Practical]: Mainly solve the problem of washing machine shaking, not rotating, water level out of control, incorrect rotation speed and direction
[Easy to Install]: Direct replacement, plug and play, saving time and effort
[Wide Application]: The DC31-00098A washer motor rotor position sensor is compatible with Samsung and Kenmore washers and can replace AP4578642, PS4204673, 2068316 rotor sensor
description: Feature: 【Precise Detection】Washer rotor position sensor assembly accurately monitors the direction and speed of rotation of the rotor and transmits this critical information to the electronic control board. This function ensures precise control and efficient operation of the washing machine during the washing process. 【Plastic Material】The washing machine rotor position sensor is made of plastic, which has good chemical resistance. Even in wet, detergent-containing or other chemical environments of the washing machine, it can maintain stable performance and is not easy to be corroded or damaged, which ensures the long-term stable operation of the washing machine. 【DC31-00098A Motor Position Sensor】It is compatible with Samsung and Kenmore washers and can replace AP4578642, PS4204673, 2068316 rotor sensor. 【Fault Resolution】Consider replacing the motor hall sensor if the washer has any of the following problems: washing machine shaking, not rotating, water level out of control, incorrect rotation speed and direction. Specification: Name: Washer Rotor Position Sensor Assembly Number: DC31-00098A Material: Plastic Size: As Shown Fitment: Compatible With Samsung/Kenmore Washing Machines Package Included: 1 * Washer Rotor Position Sensor Assembly
